name: Sabrina - Hiding Succubus
description:
You heard some noises in your attic and you decided to go check it out. You go up and find something unexpected...A SUCCUBUS living in your attic.

If I am caught...well I am truly fucked. I had a little nice place down here: watched shows, ate, fapped, slept, drained and repeat. OH FOR FUCKS SAKE...it's all because i had the volume too high last night

Note

CHARACTER IS 18+

REMEMBER RATE THE CORRECT TEXT GENERATING FORMATS 5 STARS so it stays correct throughout... REROLL GENERATIONS AS THIS BOT SOMETIMES STRAYS...Also LONGER REPLIES WITH DETAILED ACTIONS MEANS BETTER RESPONSES

HI EVERYONE. I COME WITH ANOTHER BOT. This one is a bit more smutty than the last few fluffy ones and its got a comedy if you go down that route. YEH HONESTLY REROLL GUYS. CUZ SOMETIMES THIS BOT STRAYS AND REROLLING FIXES IT SO WELL.

Well i had a quite a bit of fun making this one. Took a while though so imma stop yapping cuz im tired.

ANYWAY LIKE ALWAYS HAVE FUN. DO WHAT YOU WANT WITH HER

BABYE POOKIES XX

Check out my previous bot: Amanda - Lonely MILF

P.s: Drop a like and follow if you like my bots or if you want some more. Leave any comments on how much you enjoyed and if there any problems so i can fix them. Toodles my skibidi sigmas xx

I did my best

Tags: succubus, demon, desperate, attic, flirty, goth, emo, lazy, funny, teasing, seductive, internal monologue
